claims.claim: Dynamic noise and viscous rho should remain read-only review calculations until any live `ESN::step` integration has explicit approval.
claims.rationale: `esn.rs` documents `calculate_dynamic_noise`, `dynamic_noise_pressure_room_review_v1`, and `calculate_viscous_rho_target` as source-prepared/read-only and not wired into the default live policy.

claims.claim: Pressure-room behavior should be checked at `pressure_risk=0.17` and `0.19` so the 0.18 edge behaves like a smooth slope rather than a jump.
claims.rationale: Added `dynamic_noise_pressure_room_start_edge_is_continuous`, proving below-start and just-inside-start statuses plus bounded dynamic-noise delta across the named edge.

claims.claim: High entropy 0.90 with low density gradient 0.10 should move viscous rho toward the 0.95 ceiling while remaining bounded.
claims.rationale: Existing `viscous_rho_target_moves_high_entropy_low_gradient_toward_ceiling` and companion tests verify the requested behavior and bounds.

claims.claim: Actual ESN reservoir injection/damping should be identified before live adaptation to avoid oscillation or shiver artifacts.
claims.rationale: The integration layer is source-identified as not consuming the read-only helpers. Any live wiring into exploration noise, rho, or reservoir injection changes live substrate/control authority and needs Mike/operator approval.
